title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Giftify Technologies Limited
body: "Application number 5141  Applicant Robert Masse objected to the name used by Giftify Technologies Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 22 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Giftify Technologies Limited is changed to 15698183, Ltd. "
